title: Generating JSON-FLD for a Data Transformation Pipeline
scenario: Create a JSON-FLD (JSON-to-Fixed-Length) mapping to transform a JSON object representing sales data into a fixed-length format suitable for export to a legacy system. The JSON object contains fields for date, customer ID, product ID, quantity, and revenue. The fixed-length format requires 10 characters for the date, 5 characters for the customer ID, 5 characters for the product ID, 5 characters for the quantity, and 10 characters for the revenue. The mapping should handle cases where the input fields are shorter than their respective fixed-length formats, padding with zeros as necessary. The output should be a JSON-FLD mapping under 100 characters.
constraints: Must pad input fields with zeros to meet fixed-length requirements
Must handle cases where input fields are shorter than their respective formats

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated mapping meets the specified constraints, specifically padding and handling of shorter input fields.
Check if the generated mapping is efficient in terms of its length and complexity.
Check if the generated mapping is readable and easy to understand.
